ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Sep-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Kohli appeared by zoom for Naoki Matsumoto (petitioner/administrator).

The court questions why the petition for instructions was withdrawn. Mrs. Kohli stated that based on the probate examiner's notes, it was not an appropriate petition and that it should have been done via a spousal property petition. Mrs. Kohli also stated that she believes they can get the inventory and appraisal filed this week, that they are finalizing tracing of the community property, and that she hopes to file a final petition in two to three months. The court noted that there are a number of items in the probate examiner's notes that have not been addressed. Mrs. Matsumoto stated that she is happy to provide courtesy copies, that she can re-file the proof of service, that Lucas is an adult/19 years old, and that she can provide information regarding the proposed distribution of the motorcycle to the personal representative. The Petition to Approve Status of Administration is continued to September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Documents are to be filed by September 12, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To May-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-13-2021 Advanced From Jul-13-21 To Jul-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The holographic will dated October 4, 2016, is admitted to probate. Naoki Mastsumoto is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $450,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 20, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed one week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Denied
